title: Extend hero image to top of page and add scroll-hiding 'Delicious Mexican Food' header text

requirements.text: Extend the hero section image so it fills the full viewport from the very top of the page (y=0), removing any top offset or gap caused by the sticky header. The hero image must visually bleed behind the header so there is no white space or padding between the top of the viewport and the image.

quotes: The homepage picture that has the image I need that picture to go all the way to the top of the website

acceptanceCriteria: The hero/banner image starts at the very top edge of the browser window with no gap or offset.
No white or colored space appears between the top of the viewport and the hero image.
The image extends behind the header on load.

requirements.text: Update the Header component so that the tagline text reads exactly 'Delicious Mexican Food' (visible while the header is shown) and the header hides/disappears when the user scrolls down, reappearing when the user scrolls back up. All other header content (logo, nav links, phone number, hamburger menu) must remain unchanged.

quotes: make sure to put the words (delicious Mexican food) on the header that goes away when I scroll down

acceptanceCriteria: The header displays the text 'Delicious Mexican Food' as the tagline while visible.
The header slides out of view (upward) when the user scrolls down.
The header reappears when the user scrolls back up.
All other header elements (logo, navigation, phone number) remain unchanged.
The scroll-hide behavior uses the existing useScrollDirection hook.

constraints: Do not change any section other than HeroSection and Header.
Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
Keep all existing header elements (logo, nav links, phone number, hamburger menu) intact.
nonGoals: Redesigning any section other than the hero image positioning and header tagline.
Changing the menu, catering, contact, or footer sections.
Adding new navigation items or changing the header layout beyond the tagline text update.
